name: THOR INDUSTRIES INC
summary: THOR Industries, Inc., founded in 1980, is the largest manufacturer of recreational vehicles (RVs) in the world. The company manufactures conventional travel trailers, fifth wheels, Class A, Class B, and Class C motorhomes in the U.S. and Europe through subsidiaries including Airstream, Jayco, Keystone, Thor Motor Coach, Tiffin Group, and Erwin Hymer Group. Products are sold primarily to independent, non-franchise dealers in the U.S., Canada, and Europe, along with related parts, accessories, and RV component products.

products.name: Airstream Travel Trailers
products.description: Premium travel trailers under brands Classic, Globetrotter, International, Flying Cloud, Bambi, Basecamp, Caravel, Tradewind.

products.name: Airstream Motorhomes
products.description: Class B motorhomes sold under Interstate, Atlas, and Rangeline series.

products.name: Jayco Travel Trailers and Fifth Wheels
products.description: Conventional travel trailers and fifth wheels under Jay Flight, Jay Feather, Eagle, Pinnacle brands.

products.name: Jayco Motorhomes
products.description: Class A, B, and C motorhomes under Alante, Precept, Greyhawk, Redhawk brands.

products.name: Entegra Coach Motorhomes
products.description: Class A, B, and C motorhomes under Insignia, Aspire, Anthem, Cornerstone, Odyssey, Esteem, Emblem brands.

products.name: Keystone Travel Trailers and Fifth Wheels
products.description: Conventional travel trailers and fifth wheels under Montana, Springdale, Hideout, Cougar, Coleman, Raptor, and other brands.

products.name: Dutchmen Travel Trailers and Fifth Wheels
products.description: Travel trailers and fifth wheels under Kodiak, Aspen Trail, Astoria, Denali, Voltage, Colorado brands.

products.name: CrossRoads Travel Trailers and Fifth Wheels
products.description: Conventional travel trailers and fifth wheels under Cruiser, Volante, Sunset Trail, Zinger, and Redwood brands.

products.name: KZ Travel Trailers and Fifth Wheels
products.description: Conventional travel trailers and fifth wheels under Classic, Sportsmen, Connect, Durango, Sportster X brands.

products.name: Venture RV Travel Trailers and Fifth Wheels
products.description: Travel trailers and fifth wheels under Sienna, Sonic, Stratus, SportTrek brands.

products.name: Thor Motor Coach Motorhomes
products.description: Class A, B, and C gasoline and diesel motorhomes under Ace, Aria, Challenger, Hurricane, Tuscany, and many other brands.

products.name: Tiffin Motorhomes
products.description: Premium diesel and gasoline Class A, B, and C motorhomes under Allegro, Phaeton, Wayfarer, Zephyr, and other brands.

products.name: Erwin Hymer Group (EHG) European RVs
products.description: Motorcaravans, campervans, urban vehicles, and caravans under Hymer, Buerstner, Dethleffs, Laika, Sunlight, and other European brands.

products.name: Airxcel RV Components
products.description: RV-related products including Coleman-Mach, Suburban, Maxxair, Dicor Products sold to OEMs and via aftermarket channels.

products.name: Postle Aluminum Extrusions
products.description: Aluminum extrusions and specialized component products sold to RV and other manufacturers.

products.name: Heartland Travel Trailers and Fifth Wheels
products.description: Conventional travel trailers and fifth wheels under Bighorn, North Trail, Cyclone, Prowler, Sundance; being merged into Jayco in fiscal 2026.

partnerships.description: Supplies chassis with engine and drivetrain components for Class A, C, and B motorhomes in North America and Europe.
Supplies medium-duty truck chassis for Class A motorhomes in North America.
Supplies chassis for Class A motorhomes in North America.
Supplies small truck or van chassis for Class C and Class B motorhomes in North America.
Supplies van chassis for Class B motorhomes in North America and light-duty truck chassis for European motorcaravans.
Supplies light-duty truck chassis for European motorcaravan production by Erwin Hymer Group.
